hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: A leading Iraqi organization working for environmental sustainability and community development

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: An Iraq where the environment flourishes and sustainable development is achieved, where all citizens enjoy clean water, fresh air, and fertile land as an inherent right.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: We are an Iraqi non-governmental civil society organization working to protect and rehabilitate the Diyala River and its watershed, empowering local communities through environmental awareness programs, natural resource management, and achieving the Sustainable Development Goals.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.desc: Transparency and accountability in all our work

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.desc: Building lasting solutions for future generations

community.title: Community Partnership
community.desc: Working with communities, not just for them

team.title: Our Leadership Team
team.subtitle: A group of experts and environmental sustainability enthusiasts

history.title: Our History
history.subtitle: A journey of work and dedication for the Diyala River

sdgs.title: Sustainable Development Goals
sdgs.subtitle: We strive to achieve the UN Sustainable Development Goals
